behavior_summary: U8P_DESKEW::look: When the player examines or 'looks at' this desk object, the script emits a single short label/bark "desk" and then ends the U8P_DESKEW::look process.

U8P_DESKEW::use: When the player uses the desk, the script reads the item's status word, tests bit 0x0100, and toggles the desk's UI gump accordingly: if the bit is set it calls Item::closeGump(this), otherwise it calls Item::openGump(0x0D, this).
notable_control_flow: U8P_DESKEW::look is a simple process handler: emit bark "desk" then suspend/return (no branching or external calls).
U8P_DESKEW::use reads a status word into a temporary (local1), performs a bitmask test against 0x0100, and branches: true -> Item::closeGump(this); false -> Item::openGump(0x0D, this).
open_questions: What concrete UI/gump does id 0x0D correspond to (furniture editor, contents, properties, etc.)? (inferred only from id numeric value)
Is bit 0x0100 strictly a 'gump open' flag for this item type, or a more generic state bit with additional meanings for related items?
Are there other status bits or conditions that should be considered when toggling the gump (the script only checks 0x0100)?

main_function.name: U8P_DESKEW::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short in-world label/bark when the desk is examined by the player.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine's 'U8P_DESKEW::look' (examine) process for this item instance or when a player inspects the desk.

function_map.name: U8P_DESKEW::look
function_map.role: show short description / player-facing bark on inspect

function_map.name: U8P_DESKEW::use
function_map.role: handle player 'U8P_DESKEW::use' action; read status and open/close UI gump

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: query item status word (used to test bit 0x0100)

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: close the currently open gump/UI for the item

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: open a specific gump/UI (called with id 0x0D and the item instance)

external_calls.purpose: Obtain the item's status word (stored into local1) to test bit 0x0100 for gump open/closed state.
Close the item's UI/gump when the status bit 0x0100 indicates the gump is currently open.
Open gump id 0x0D for the item when the status bit 0x0100 indicates the gump is closed.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_DESKEW::look: When the player examines or 'looks at' this desk object, the script emits a single short label/bark "desk" and then ends the U8P_DESKEW::look process.
